title: Requesting a New Laptop or Peripheral Hardware
text:
Q: How do I request a new laptop or peripheral hardware?
A: To request a new laptop or peripheral hardware, please follow these steps: Windows: Step 1: Open your web browser and navigate to the company intranet. Step 2: Log in using your company credentials. Step 3: Locate the IT Helpdesk section and click on 'Hardware Requests'. macOS: Step 1: Open Safari and go to the company intranet. Step 2: Sign in with your company credentials. Step 3: Find the IT Helpdesk section and select 'Hardware Requests'. Step 4: Fill out the request form, providing details such as the type of laptop or peripheral needed, the reason for the request, and any specific requirements. Step 5: Submit the form. Step 6: You will receive a confirmation email once your request is submitted. Step 7: The IT department will review your request and may contact you for further information. Step 8: Once approved, you will be notified about the pickup or delivery of your new hardware. Please allow 5-7 business days for processing your request.
